title: Free housing for BPL families — Indiramma Indlu
target_beneficiaries: Below Poverty Line (BPL) families in Telangana
target_amount: Free housing unit per eligible family
summary: The Indiramma Indlu scheme targets 3 lakh free houses for BPL families in the first two years. Progress has been severely delayed — land acquisition disputes, municipal layout approvals, and contractor mobilisation issues have slowed construction. Only a fraction of the target has broken ground.

sources.label: Indiramma Indlu housing scheme delays — The Hindu
BPL housing construction update — Deccan Chronicle
Indiramma housing targets missed — Telangana Today
